summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Aptus Drawdown Managed Equity ETF (ADME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to select large-cap US stocks that exhibit positive fundamental and momentum characteristics combined with a downside hedge. ADME was launched on Jun 8, 2016 and is issued by Aptus Capital Advisors.

holdings.infoBox: ADME is an equity ETF with a total of 168 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.93%, Apple at 7.43%, Alphabet at 6.08%, Microsoft at 4.52%, and Amazon.com at 3.87%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
